zh.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu是Enguerrand II de Ponthieu的兒子，於大約1032年出生在法國皮卡迪。他於大約1053年與Adila d’Amiens在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1054年登記服兵役。他去世於1100年11月13日在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆阿別維爾享年69歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪阿別維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu是Enguerrand II de Ponthieu的儿子，于大约1032年出生在法国皮卡迪。他于大约1053年与Adila d’Amiens在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1054年登记服兵役。他去世于1100年11月13日在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆阿別維爾享年69岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪阿別維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montreuil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Carolle, Edouard, Jean-Pierre, Marcel, Veronique.
French: habitational name from any of a number of places in northern France, so named from Latin monasteriolum, a diminutive of monasterium ‘monastery’. Compare Montroy .

variants.name: Montroy
meanings: French: habitational name from either of the places so called, in Puy-de-Dôme and Charente-Maritime. This surname is very rare in France.

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu was born about 1032, in Picardie, France as the son of Enguerrand II de Ponthieu. He married Adila d’Amiens about 1053, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1054. He died on 13 November 1100, in Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 69, and was buried in Abbeville, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu est né environ 1032, à Picardie, France, fils d’Enguerrand II de Ponthieu. Il a épousé Adila d’Amiens environ 1053, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1054. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1100, à Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Abbeville, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu wurde um 1032 in Picardie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Enguerrand II de Ponthieu geboren. Er hat um 1053 in Frankreich Adila d’Amiens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1054 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 13. November 1100 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Abbeville, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu è nato il circa 1032 nel Picardie, Francia come figlio di Enguerrand II de Ponthieu. Lui sposato Adila d’Amiens circa 1053, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1054. Morì il 13 novembre 1100, nel Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbeville, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieuは約1032年にフランスピカーディでEnguerrand II de Ponthieuの息子として生まれた。約1053年にフランスでAdila d’Amiensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1054年に兵役登録をした。彼は1100年11月13日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメアベヴィルで69歳で死去し，フランスピカーディアベヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu(은)는 대략 1032년 프랑스 피카디에서 Enguerrand II de Ponthieu의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1053년 프랑스에서 Adila d’Amiens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1054년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1100년 11월 13일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 애브베빌에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 애브베빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu nasceu aproximadamente 1032, em Picardie, França filho de Enguerrand II de Ponthieu. Ele casou-se com Adila d’Amiens aproximadamente 1053, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1054. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1100, em Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbeville, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu родился около 1032 г. в местности пикарди, Франция. Его отца звали Enguerrand II de Ponthieu. Он женился на женщине по имени Adila d’Amiens около 1053 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1054 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 13 ноября 1100 г. в местности эббевилл, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности эббевилл, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Guy de Montreuil Comte de Montreuil et Ponthieu nació aproximadamente 1032, en Picardie, Francia como hijo de Enguerrand II de Ponthieu. Se casó con Adila d’Amiens aproximadamente 1053, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1054. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1100, en Abbeville, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Abbeville, Picardie, Francia.
